headline: Local Man Says 'I Could Do That' While Watching Olympic Gymnast, Promptly Falls Off Couch
summary: His wife has recorded the incident and plans to play it at their next dinner party.
fullBody: Craig Armchair, 45, made the fatal mistake of uttering 'honestly, that doesn't look that hard' during the balance beam finals. His wife dared him to demonstrate. Craig attempted a 'simple cartwheel' in the living room, knocked over a lamp, pulled a hamstring, and landed face-first into a bowl of chips. 'I meant I could do the cheering part,' he said from the floor. The video has 2 million views on TikTok under the hashtag #OlympicDreamsDashed.
